title: Chain skills: validating gate-in per D1/D2, briefing drift per D9, swarming worker-prompt cites cell for tiny
action: RED-FIRST: extend the lane-doctrine section: (a) 'artifact_readiness' ABSENT from skills/bee-validating/SKILL.md, frozen-plan+cells gate-in wording present (D1/D2); (b) briefing drift rule names cell changes as the only drift source (D9); (c) swarming worker-prompt line covers the tiny/small no-plan case (cite the cell). Record RED to docs/history/lane-ceremony-v3/reports/lcv3-3-red.txt. THEN edit: bee-validating/SKILL.md gate-in condition (lines ~27,31): inputs = plan.md approved at Gate 2 and frozen (D1) + current-slice cells existing (D2); absence/unapproved still returns to bee-planning; keep bypass tokens in the Gate-3 section untouched. bee-briefing/SKILL.md: sources = frozen plan + cells (plan can no longer drift after approval — D1), drift rule (line ~84) triggers on cell changes only (D9), lane table row for small aligned to D4 (brief only when a plan.md exists on request), tiny/spike row unchanged. bee-swarming/SKILL.md line ~96: worker prompt cites the cell as the work spec for tiny/small (plan.md only when the lane has one), line ~150 next-slice wording aligned to D2 (next slice = next batch of cells from planning, plan unchanged). Re-run doctrine test to GREEN. CLOSE-OUT (same cell, per critical-patterns :514-530 — the release manifest hashes the canonical skills/ tree, so a skill edit without manifest regen leaves the shared verify baseline red for every session): after the doctrine test is GREEN, run node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs (must exit 0; a marker refusal means your edit broke a render marker — fix it, never bypass) then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, and include the rendered plugin trees + manifest in this cell's single commit.

truths: validating still refuses when the plan is unapproved or cells are missing — the gate-in check is renamed, not weakened
AO14 single-worker + orchestrator-never-implements rules in swarming survive
prohibitions: no edits outside the listed files (the files array is authoritative)
do not touch bee-executing or bee-scribing (inventory: zero required changes)

trace.outcome: Chain skills (bee-validating, bee-briefing, bee-swarming) rewritten to match D1/D2/D9: validating gate-in now reads plan.md approved+frozen at Gate 2 (D1) plus current-slice cells existing (D2), replacing the retired artifact_readiness field, while still refusing when the plan is unapproved or cells are missing. Briefing's drift rule now fires on cell changes only, since D1 freezes plan.md after approval (D9); small-lane brief row aligned to D4 (plan.md opt-in). Swarming's worker-prompt line now cites the cell as the work spec for tiny/small (no plan.md, D3/D4), and the next-slice completion wording names the next batch of cells rather than a plan-document slice (D2). AO14 single-worker + orchestrator-never-implements rules verified intact. RED-first: 6 new assertions added to test_gate_bypass_doctrine.mjs, recorded 6 FAILs before rewrite (docs/history/lane-ceremony-v3/reports/lcv3-3-red.txt), all GREEN after. Plugin trees + release manifest regenerated same-cell.
